[Commits to Master Since This Release](https://github.com/dhowe/AdNauseam/compare/%version%...master)

#### How to Install the Developer Build:

- **Firefox**: Download the build from [adnauseam_%version%.firefox.xpi](https://github.com/dhowe/AdNauseam/releases/download/%version%/adnauseam_%version%.firefox.xpi).
- **Chromium**: Download the build from [adnauseam_%version%.chromium.zip](https://github.com/dhowe/AdNauseam/releases/download/%version%/adnauseam_%version%.chromium.zip) and [load unpacked](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/get-started/tutorial/hello-world#load-unpacked).
